Access Changes - Takaanini and Te Mahia Train Stations

There are works happening to construct new pedestrian bridges at Takaanini and Te Mahia Stations until mid-2026. These works will only impact pedestrian access to and through the stations. Stairs-only temporary bridges are in place to each station platform until construction is complete, from Takaanini Park & Ride and Great South Road respectively. For mobility assistance to any stations between Papakura and Manurewa from either station, call 0800 025 999 to arrange for a taxi service. Taxi services can be boarded from Takaanini Park and Ride in the accessibility parking bays, or from bus stop 2420 on Great South Road.

Search 'Takaanini Station Pedestrian Bridge' or 'Te Mahia Station Pedestrian Bridge' for more information.
